Website Setup (Plug & Play)
Things to keep in mind:
● This entire process should NOT take more than a day.
● Clients care about results & value conveyed, not your website.
● Make sure you change the font, logo, services, background video/photo and a
few other things about the site to make it original and yours.
Please remember that you should be focused on signing clients and not stuff like
your website. I got to $8,000+ a month with no website and not even an agency
name… it shouldn’t be a huge focus of yours.
That’s why I built you your own plug n play website ready to use today with just a few
tweaks.
Step 1: Set Up ClickFunnels
If you haven’t already - Make sure you get a 14 day free trial of ClickFunnels using this
link:
https://growyouragency.com/clickfunnelstrail
ClickFunnels is where we host our agency website, on-boarding, scheduling link etc.
It’s a key piece of software.
Step 2: Download The Template
Once you’ve signed up to ClickFunnels, you can download the website template by
clicking HERE
Step 3: Link Domain To ClickFunnels
Straight the box ClickFunnels gives you an ugly domain like:
iman-gadzhi.clickfunnels.com Instead we want a clean link, something like:
iman-gadzhi.com
In order to do that, we need to link the two together. I shot a full step by step video
showing you exactly how to do that. View the video HERE
ClickFunnels tutorial if you use GSuite: Click HERE
ClickFunnels tutorial if you use GoDaddy, Namecheap, Etc: Click HERE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 3 --

Website Setup (Plug & Play)
Step 4: Customise Website
It’s incredibly important that you customise the website and make it truly your own.
The best way to do that is change up the colour scheme a little, change up the font,
services and images.
Important: Make sure you swap out the SEO details for each page.
Here’s a video showing you what I mean. View the video HERE
Step 5: Finish Scheduling Page
You would’ve already set up your acuity scheduling account in the ‘Tools To
6-Figures’ module.
Now it’s time to embed it on the scheduling page.
Once that’s done, shoot a video using Loom that runs them through the process of
booking and how the zoom link will be in the confirmation email.
Once you finish recording it, download it & upload it to either Youtube or Vimeo.
Here’s a video showing you what I mean. View the video HERE
Step 6: Put Pixel On Funnel
We want to be able to pixel track potential clients that come to our website and also
tracks who books in a Discovery Call with us.
You should’ve already set up your Business Manager, Ads Manager & Pixel using a
prior PNP document.
Here’s a video showing you how I did it. View the video HERE
Step 7: Make Links Pretty
We want to make sure that the links look ‘pretty’ and look good.
Here’s a video showing you how I did it. View the video HERE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 3 --

Website Setup (Plug & Play)
Step 8: Set Acuity Re-Direct
Once someone books in a call with us, we want to send them to the thank you page
of the website template.
This also helps us later when we run some cheap $5/per day Facebook Ads.
Here’s a video showing you how to do it. View the video HERE
<script type="text/javascript">
window.top.location = 'YOUR URL';
</script>
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
